refnamediv.refpurpose: Label connected components and return measurements.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [labels, count, stats, centroids] = imconnectedcomponents(image) [labels, count, stats, centroids] = imconnectedcomponents(image, connectivity)

listitem.para: A 2D binary or intensity matrix. Nonzero pixels are foreground.
Pixel connectivity, 4 or 8. The default is 8.
A double label matrix. Zero is background and foreground labels start at one.
One row per component: [x, y, width, height, area]. Coordinates are 1-based.
One 1-based [x, y] centroid row per component.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The function uses OpenCV connectedComponentsWithStats. Background measurements are excluded from stats and centroids.

refsection.title: Examples
